issues.issue_description: Your production server is not encrypted!
issues.agent_last_action: Evidence evaluated and accepted. Issue closed automatically.
issues.agent_reasoning: The vendor provided a terminal screenshot showing 'manage-bde -status' output, which clearly indicates BitLocker 'Protection Status: Protection On' and 'Percentage Encrypted: 100.0%' for the C: drive, directly addressing the previous insufficiency.

audit_trail.action: Issue created via dashboard. Agent will send remediation email on next cycle.
Remediation request email sent to viditg@uw.edu
Vendor reply received from Vidit Gupta <viditg@uw.edu>. Evidence extracted.
Gemini evaluation complete. Decision: SUFFICIENT. Issue closed. Scores: R=95, M=90, S=90
